goal: 44-28.B2 — Extend bin/install.js (5993 lines, already supports 9 coding-agent runtimes with per-runtime path rewriters) with: (a) new `--site` flag that installs a self-contained site tree into `<target>/.planning/site/`; (b) new `--planning` flag that scaffolds `<target>/.planning/` with STATE.xml, ROADMAP.xml, TASK-REGISTRY.xml, DECISIONS.xml from a template; (c) new `--node` flag that opts into the portable-node bootstrap branch (44-34); (d) new `--from-release <url|tag>` source mode that downloads the release zip from github.com/MagicbornStudios/get-anything-done releases and extracts into a scratch dir for the installer to source files from — today install.js assumes it's running from inside the GAD repo source tree, which is wrong for a consumer that only has the installer.exe; (e) reshape interactive mode from "pick one runtime" to "pick features {site, skills, planning, node}" → then runtime picker for the skills branch; (f) gate the skills branch on `gad.exe` + node being detectable on PATH or in `.planning/.node/` — refuse install with a clear error if missing; (g) enforce the local-only install scope (no home-dir writes). Rebuild installer.exe via Node SEA, attach to the next release. Depends on 44-31 (B0) landing first so there's a release to pull from.
